items.name: Vintage Velcro Sandal Sneakers
items.description:
"These stylish sandal sneakers feature a velcro design with trendy mesh material for comfort and breathability. The vibrant green and light purple color combination adds a playful touch to your look. With a bold front outsole, these sneakers are perfect for making a fashion statement while staying comfortable.
